title: Business Development (Retail / Commercial Fit Out)
description:
Location: Singapore (regional scope)
Work Arrangement: Flexible
Travel: Minimum 25% across Southeast Asia

We are partnering with a globally established brand design and implementation consultancy specializing in delivering high-impact branded environments across retail, hospitality, automotive, banking, insurance, corporate spaces, health & wellness brands.

They are seeking a driven Business Development professional to lead client acquisition across Southeast Asia.

Key Responsibilities

  • Drive new business development across SEA, focusing on securing large, strategic clients
  • Identify, engage, and build relationships with C-suite, regional GMs, marketing leaders, retail directors, and procurement decision-makers
  • Lead the full business development lifecycle from prospecting to closing, including pipeline management, pitch development, proposals, and negotiations
  • Collaborate with internal consulting, design, delivery, and program teams to ensure commercial alignment and high-quality client engagement
  • Represent the firm at key industry events, conferences, and client meetings regionally

Required Experience & Profile

  • Minimum 2 years’ proven success in a business development / sales / hunter role, ideally for fit-outs or build-outs in luxury retail, hospitality, automotive, banking, insurance, corporate spaces, health & wellness brands
  • Demonstrated track record of winning and growing regional or multinational clients
  • Confident engaging senior stakeholders, with strong presentation, storytelling, and commercial negotiation skills
  • Comfortable working independently in a growth environment; proactive, entrepreneurial mindset
  • Willing to travel at least 25% across Southeast Asia (and potentially more depending on business needs)


Contact
Dawn Gulanes
dawn.gulanes@keplersearch.com
EA Licence no. 18S9419 | EA Personnel no. R1551518

postedCompany.description:
Kepler Search is a boutique executive search firm that offers bespoke recruitment and human capital solutions. Our team of expert consultants and researchers have over 25 years of experience and more critically, we have an established network in Asia. We provide unrivalled access to the best talent in the region, insights into latest market trends and in-depth local knowledge to support your organisation’s growth. 

People are the most valuable assets of a company as every organisation’s success is largely determined by the quality of its human capital. Kepler Search works in true partnership with you to understand hiring needs and growth plans. One solution does not fit all; we provide a tailored approach to achieve the best recruitment outcome for you.  

The consultants at Kepler Search have partnered with companies ranging from innovative start-ups to large multinationals, helping them build and expand their presence in Asia. We have assisted our clients in building brand new teams from ground zero to expanding locally or regionally. Our offering of curated methodologies create unique solutions that are directly suited to different business needs.?

We aim to provide the very best talent for our valued clients across key business functions and industry sectors.

www.keplersearch.com

www.linkedin.com/company/keplersearch
